text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Sorry again... I swore things would turn out
differently this time, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap is visibly upset. This losing streak must
be taking its toll.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Can you tell me what I need to do to win? What is
it that I'm lacking?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
With the way things are now, I can barely down
three bowls of rice... I'm just not myself.
choice_data_list: Slow and steady... Let's not rush it.
Let's get back into the swing of things!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Maybe that losing streak just has me
rattled.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
"The key to making a good product is to keep
trying until you get it right."

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...That's what Tome always used to say. I wanna
keep trying different approaches, just like
everyone back home did.
choice_data_list: Let's give it all we've got!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With Oguri Cap back to her usual self, I have high
hopes for her next race.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: ...Get back into the swing of things, huh?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Back home, even if we had a bad
harvest, it would never faze anyone.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: They'd just laugh and say, "Keep on keepin' on."

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I can't let this faze me—just like how a little bit of
misfortune never fazed them.
choice_data_list: Let's keep on keepin' on, Oguri!
Let's keep on keepin' on, Oguri!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes sparkling, Oguri Cap and I take our
training to the next level.
